_meta.source: FMP MCP connector (quote endpoint for VIX; premarket/news scan for flags)
_meta.note: Companion file for the dip/pop OHLCV feed (dip_pop_ohlcv.csv). Overwritten each run (not appended) — always reflects the latest snapshot, refreshed at premarket and market-close task runs. Flag values: Normal | Caution | Avoid. Avoid should gate a green technical verdict; Caution should annotate it.
_meta.category_note: category = the primary driver behind the flag: macro-scheduled | sector-contagion | single-name | geopolitical | other. See dip_pop_flag_history.csv for the append-only burn-in log.
_meta.repair_note: 2026-07-20: manually restored from dip_pop_flag_history.csv after the 7:07 AM premarket run wrote a stale (Jul 17) payload; values = today's premarket flags. Close run refreshes normally tonight.

flags.reason: MU +4.8% premarket rebounding off bear-market lows after SK Hynix memory-price warning sparked broad buy-the-dip in memory names (Barrons/Invezz, Jul 20); still ~30% below June ATH.
SNDK +4.2% premarket tracking MU's memory-sector rebound after SK Hynix price warning (Invezz, Jul 20); up ~580% YTD, extreme-volatility name.
No MSFT-specific catalyst found premarket; -0.8% in line with broad pre-open tone.
